## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Testing

- [ ] I ran the relevant command or test locally
- [ ] I verified the main behavior affected by this PR
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed

## Data And Output Check

- [ ] No private raw data was committed unintentionally
- [ ] No generated output was committed unintentionally
- [ ] Any intentionally committed sample data is safe to publish

## Notes

- Risks, assumptions, or follow-up work
